findings: Launcher does not fully hard-enforce premium/banned model policy outside metaswarm gating; default MODEL is claude-haiku-4.5 and --agent-cmd can bypass model templating.
Metaswarm max-5 commanders error message claims total cap 1600 even though 5 x 250 implies 1250 leaf workers.
Teardown/recovery UX is inconsistent: usage suggests --teardown --run-id alone, but repo-local cleanup depends on repo context.
Launch-proof files are seeded and prompted, but launcher success path does not verify proof counts before declaring completion.
